Mixed martial arts events
2005 in Shooto
Information
First dateJanuary 29, 2005

Events
Total events27
Fights
Total fights177
Title fights1
Chronology
2004 in Shooto 2005 in Shooto 2006 in Shooto

The year 2005 is the 17th year in the history of Shooto, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Japan. In 2005 Shooto held 27 events beginning with, Shooto: 1/29 in Korakuen Hall.

Title fights

[edit]
Title fights in 2005
Weight class Method Round Time Event Notes
Featherweight Alexandre Franca Nogueira (c) def. Joao Roque Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: 3/11 in Korakuen Hall [a]
